title: taraxacum chlorostephum
intro: Taraxacum chlorostephum, also known as the yellow dandelion or lesser dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus Taraxacum. It is often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Taraxacum chlorostephum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
